metadata.title: Ideogram Character - AI Character Editor | Marble AI
metadata.description: Ideogram Character by Ideogram AI. Ensures characters retain core features such as facial traits, proportions, and hairstyles across different scenes and styles. Image-to-image editing only.

hero.title: Ideogram Character
hero.description: Ideogram's character consistency feature. Ensure characters retain core features like facial traits, proportions, and hairstyles across different scenes and artistic styles.

introduce.title: About Ideogram Character
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Ideogram Character is the latest feature released by Ideogram AI, ensuring characters retain core features across different scenes, artistic styles, and contexts.

items.title: Facial Consistency
items.description: Maintains facial traits and expressions across different generations and styles.

items.title: Proportion Preservation
items.description: Preserves character proportions and body structure in various poses and scenes.

items.title: Hairstyle Retention
items.description: Keeps hairstyles and distinctive features consistent across transformations.

items.title: Style Flexibility
items.description: Apply different artistic styles while maintaining character identity.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Ideogram Character ideal for character-based content.

items.title: Image-to-Image Only
items.description: Specialized for character editing and transformation workflows.

items.title: Base Operation
items.description: Create characters from a single reference image with consistent features.

items.title: Edit Operation
items.description: Fine-tune existing characters while preserving core identity.

items.title: Remix Operation
items.description: Combine character features with new styles and contexts.

items.title: API Integration
items.description: Seamless API access for developers to integrate into applications.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all character images.

use-cases.title: Use Cases
use-cases.description: Explore the diverse applications of Ideogram Character.

items.description: Create consistent characters for comics and graphic novels.

items.title: Animation
items.description: Generate character sheets and poses for animation projects.

items.title: Game Development
items.description: Create game characters with consistent appearance across assets.

items.title: Brand Mascots
items.description: Develop brand mascots with consistent appearance in various contexts.

items.title: Storytelling
items.description: Maintain character consistency across visual storytelling projects.

items.title: Marketing Content

items.title: What is Ideogram Character?
items.description: Ideogram Character is Ideogram AI's feature for ensuring characters retain core features like facial traits, proportions, and hairstyles across different scenes.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Ideogram Character supports Image To Image editing only, specializing in character consistency.

items.title: How does it maintain consistency?
items.description: It uses advanced AI to preserve facial traits, proportions, hairstyles, and other distinctive features across different styles and contexts.

items.title: What operations are available?
items.description: Ideogram Character offers Base (create from reference), Edit (modify existing), and Remix (combine with new styles) operations.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All character images created with Ideogram Character through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: Is it good for animation?
items.description: Yes! Ideogram Character is excellent for creating consistent character sheets and poses for animation projects.

cta.title: Ready to Try Ideogram Character?
cta.description: Experience consistent character generation. Create characters that maintain their identity across styles.
